review_text:
I had my brows done 2 years ago at a different salon and they were fading and still a bit darker than I wanted even after all that time. I did a lot of research and ended up choosing Dermaluxe Spa.
I’m very happy with my results. I had 2 sessions for brow removal and it looks great. They are very professional and I appreciated her knowledge and care to get me the best results I could have asked for.

Saw Kaisha for 2nd eyebrow removal- again quick and easy
Also had an excellent micro needle with Carlos- best I’ve ever had- very thorough and pain free-
Thank you both

Kashia is amazing. She’s truly no-nonsense and gives it to you straight in the best way. She genuinely wants the best for her clients and isn’t afraid to give honest, helpful feedback. You can trust that she’ll guide you in the right direction. Absolutely worth the wait to get an appointment with her.

We are extremely disappointed with Kashia”s arrogant & unfair Attitude & behavior , I was given an appointment for treatment , however Kashia sent me away after a brief 2 minute meeting and took another customer in my place , changing my given appointment on the last minute for which we were made to travel 25 - 30 miles in Rush - hour for a 10 am appointment and then abruptly refused treatment for another customer in my place .
Kashia was superb. I have a scar on my eyebrow, not now!  My eyebrows are beautiful! Both my sister and I are incredibly amazed by Kashis’s talent!
Beautiful and calming decor, team was very knowledgeable and walked me through everything. Treatment was easy and comfortable. Love my results! Highly recommend.
I just finished a touch up and I couldn't be happier! My initial session healed beautifully and this touch up is going to make my brows everything I wanted. I would recommend Dermaluxe to anyone!

I went to Dermaluxe Spa for laser brow tattoo removal with Kashia, and she was incredible. As a woman of color, I was nervous because I’m at higher risk for hyperpigmentation, but she took her time, started with gentle settings, and watched my skin closely. I had no signs of hyperpigmentation at all. Kashia really knows how to treat melanin‑rich skin safely. Highly recommend her for laser removal.

I had such a great experience at Dermaluxe Spa with Kashia. She is incredibly professional, honest, and truly has your best interest at heart. What I appreciated most is that she didn’t just tell me what I wanted to hear, she told me what was right for my skin and situation.

I originally went in hoping for nano brows, but Kashia carefully assessed my previous microblading (which had become uneven over the years) and explained that I wasn’t a good candidate just yet. Instead, she recommended laser removal first to give me the best possible result long-term. That level of honesty and expertise really stood out to me.

The laser treatment itself was quick and very manageable. I have one more session to go before moving forward with powder brows, and I already feel 100% confident that I’m in the best hands. Kashia’s artistry and attention to detail are evident, and I can’t wait to go back and continue the process.

Highly recommend!
Transformed my brows!! Thank you so much!

Kaisha
Is top notch in Her field.  She always does an excellent job on my eyebrows.  I have been going to her for 7 years and have never been disappointed 🥰 Teddi Rhodes

After 9 years of searching and wanting to remove my old microblading I found kashia and thank goodness I did!! I had three removal sessions and I’m extremely happy with my results. She was very honest with expectations and outcomes of my removal. She even responded after hours with answers to my questions very quickly. I would highly recommend her!!
Posting under my husband‘s name. 😂I’m always so happy with the results with my eyebrows after coming to Dermaluxe. Prompt and professional-would recommend!
Great service and they really know what they’re  doing.
An amazing job! Kashia work is perfection!
I have had nano brows done twice at Dermaluxe Spa and have been very happy with the results both times! Kashia does an amazing job! Exceeds expectations! Highly recommend!!

I visited Dermaluxe today for eyebrows tattoo removed. This was my first time having permanent make up removed .Kashia  was exceptionally kind and made me feel comfortable right away. Looking forward to have more treatments done at Dermaluxe spa. Thank you Keshia.
I had the best experience ever, calm and professional facial treatment. Not trying to sell you too hard. Just genuinely interested in you being happy with your skin. Recommending for sure!
Enjoy the services offered at Dermaluxe Spa. Kashia is truly a professional perfectionist.
The quality of all the services I experienced were beyond my expectations 💜I’m going to make it a monthly commitment to my personal care.  Thank you all for being top notch

This was my second time coming here, and Kashia absolutely nailed it again. I got nano brows and lip blushing done, and I’m seriously so happy with the results. Her attention to detail is unmatched, and she really takes her time to make sure everything looks perfect. You can tell she genuinely cares about her work and her clients. Highly recommend!

Got powdering on my eyebrows and I am in absolute shock on how amazing my brows came out! I’m already getting so many compliments! 10/10 recommend!

Update:
Got my eyebrows redone & still at in love!!! Doesn’t hurt at all, and comes out perfect!!
LOVE LOVE my eyebrows!  The experience was so wonderful and so nice now not to have to pencil in everyday. I highly highly recommend!

Kashia and Carlos are the best!
Kashia did my microblading removal ans it was such an easy process. She was very informative  beforehand and made the process feel like a breeze. Certainly considering having her do a fresh set of powder brows once they heal.
Carlos did my facial as I've been struggling with some of my skin issues and my skin has NEVER looked so good!! Will be making this a monthly thing for sure!
Kashia is absolutely amazing, extremely talented, and very professional! I loved my experience at Dermaluxe Spa!

I recently visited Dermaluxe for Microdermabrasion facial. This was my first time having services at this location and was a bit apprehensive, but excited at the same time. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was warm, welcoming and incredibly relaxing. My Esthetician 'Carlos' was exceptionally kind, attentive, and made me feel comfortable right away.

The service itself was outstanding! My skin felt noticeably smoother, healthier, and genuinely rejuvenated, an absolute 100% improvement. The level of care Carlos provided exceeded my expectations. It's clear Dermaluxe takes pride in delivering high-quality services with great results.

I highly recommend Dermaluxe! They have a wide variety of services available to meet all of your skincare needs. If you're ready for a refreshing, transformative skincare experience book your appointment today. Trust me, you will not be disappointed.
I will certainly be returning regularly.
Carlos is a great esthetician. Did a chemical peel for my acne and acne scars. I love the results and definitely recommend!!
CARLOS!!! You’ve brightened me up
Amazing experience every time she works her magic.Kashia is a perfectionist.  She understands what a client wants and helps make the right choice to achieve the absolutely best result.
Excellent as always!
The absolute best service I have ever received. I recommend 100%. Her office was easy to find and the customer service was amazing!

I cannot say enough good things about my experience at Dermaluxe Spa! I have always been extremely cautious about letting anyone touch my eyebrows, but something told me to trust Carlos and I am glad I did.
Carlos truly listened to everything I asked for. Unlike many past experiences, he did not take off more eyebrow than I wanted. He respected my preferences and delivered exactly what I envisioned. I had my eyebrows waxed and laminated, and the results are great!
I also want to highlight Kashia, who I previously consulted with about microblading/nanoblading. She was incredibly honest with me about whether it was the right option and walked me through all of my choices instead of pushing a service that wasn’t best for me. That level of honesty and care really says a lot about this business. I definitely recommend Dermaluxe.

Carlos gave me the best dermaplanning facial i have ever gotten. My face is glowing and i look more chiseled some how. Very well priced and great products. Will be coming back to get the spf moisturizer❤️
It was my first time and Carlos did a great job!
Mi fiance use the services and she's very happy
Kashia always does a perfect job! I have been getting powder brow for 5 years from her and love the convenience of having perfect brows. It's so easy to take care of and lasts a long time.

I had Nano brows done at Dermaluxe Spa and couldn’t be more pleased with the results. Kashia is very precise and gave my thinning brows a very natural and full look. Her work is amazing. I would recommend her to anyone that is looking for this procedure.
The best for micro shading!! She makes sure it’s perfect!! Highly recommend!
Great and effective service. Excited for my brows.

Kashia is a tattoo removal queen. She is patient, kind, and knowledgeable.. Super responsive with appointments. So thankful I found her so I can get this permanent eyeliner gone once and for all. I highly recommend Dermaluxe Spa!

Update: went for 1 more removal to get some remnants gone! Kashia worked her magic and it’s finally all gone. I had 5 total treatments. So pleased with my results!

Amazing experience with Kashia! I went in for a pmu removal consultation and I am very pleased and ready for my removal session. Kashia was very patient, knowledgeable and didn’t mind answering any questions that came about. Thank you so much!!!

We had an amazing experience at Dermaluxe Spa with Kashia. My wife had a bad microblading job done elsewhere, and the results were really unnatural due to multiple pigment colors. After doing our research, we came to Dermaluxe, and Kashia was honest, careful, and extremely knowledgeable from day one.

She recommended multiple laser removal sessions before redoing the microblading, and she handled everything with incredible care and patience. She spent a lot of time on both the initial session and the touch-up, never rushed, and paid attention to every detail. The final result looks completely natural, and my wife is 100% happy. Highly recommend Kashia if you’re looking for someone you can truly trust.
First class and responsive. I have had several procedures mainly micro needling and facials and was super impressed with the office and staff.

I made an appointment to do microblading few days before Christmas wanted to look nicer for the holiday, the evening before my appointment i received email to confirming my appointment, I said yes I'm coming.the next day I'm driving and excited to do get my eyebrows done for the holidays, the place- closed and no body takes the phone, I'm checking my email and see email that was send 1.5 hour before my appointment: " Victoria,  I’m so sorry but I think I have a head cold or something and in rough shape over here. It started yesterday but took a turn for the worst. I don’t have any availability till January. I can give you a discount for the inconvenience since you’ve been to me before in the past. "
I was confused?!?!?
Like whatttt !?
Again?!!???
I was in SHOCK!!!!
What is this !?
Are you kidding me!?
I took baby sitter for that today!
I was driving 45 min each direction!!!
Why did you confirm yesterday the appointment if you felt bad alreafy yesterday !?
And even didn't bother to call?!!
I don't check my emails all day!!
What kind of service is it?!?
I understand everyone can get sick! but it was not the first time that I was canceling an hour before my appointment!
Previos time she did the same!
I took a day off to get done my eyebrows-I lost a lot of money that day
She send me SMS at the morning that she got stomach pain from green tea!
And she could not maje it!
Are you serious?!?!

You can't do it to your costumers!

it's not responsible.
not respectfull at all!!!
everyone have life and things to do!!!
Who gonna pay me for my day off or the baby sitter?! Your discount of 50$ not gonna cover any of that!

Happy marry Christmas to you.

***And if you that sorry for the inconvenience...as you charge fee from your costumers who is not letting you know 24 hours prior the appointment the same way you need to pay "fees" for cancelation on your costumers -canceling on us!!!

I had an amazing experience getting my eyebrows microbladed by Kashia Buks. She was incredibly professional, patient, and detail-oriented, making sure the shape suited my face perfectly. The results look so natural, especially important for someone with lighter brows. I’m so happy with how much they frame my face now. Highly recommend Kashia to anyone considering microblading!
The attention to detail is phenomenal here. I love my eyebrows! Highly recommend
Elite skin care and aesthetics services. Kasha is very knowledgeable about different skin types and how to provide services that yield the best results.

Kashia is a brow angel and true master of her craft. I came to her with a really difficult ask on a very fast timeline and she went out of her way to take care of me. I’m so pleased with the result and grateful for Kashia’s expertise, kindness, and willingness to go above and beyond.🤍
